title: Piquant Peruvian Peruvian Lamb Seco de Cordero
description: A quick-fix, savory dish from Peru featuring tender lamb and a rich marzipan broth. This vegan-friendly twist on the classic Seco de Cordero is a must-try for adventurous foodies.
instructions: Heat the rendered fat in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb shoulder and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, garlic, and ají amarillo peppers to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the quinoa to the pot and stir to combine.
Pour in enough water to cover the lamb and quinoa, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the chopped marzipan and season with salt to taste.
Serve the Seco de Cordero hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
Note: This recipe is a vegan-friendly twist on the classic Seco de Cordero, so be sure to use vegan-friendly ingredients and adjust the seasoning accordingly.
